Work

Command-center builds for service, ecommerce, operations, and founder-led teams.

Explore dashboards, routing systems, reporting engines, and internal tools shaped around specific operating moments.

Featured case study: Ops Command Hub

A service company replaced scattered intake, scheduling, and escalation spreadsheets with one role-aware queue and leadership reporting layer.

Ops Command Hub

Intake routing with owner alerts and escalation logic.
